title: Manual serde impls: correct pattern for string enums with lossless unknown
description: Using manual Serialize/Deserialize impls driven by an as_str() method is exactly right for this problem. The alternatives — deriving with serde(rename) or serde(other) — cannot support lossless Unknown because serde's derive machinery has no way to store the original string in a unit variant. The as_str() method is also the correct abstraction: it unifies Display, Serialize, and any future From<&str> or PartialEq<str> impls at one call site. The three enums are structurally identical and consistent with BodyType and PushUrgency already in the file, so a contributor encountering the pattern elsewhere in the file will recognize it immediately.
